description: Letter or letter draft from a son to father. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Late, probably no earlier than 16th century. Mainly consists of greetings, including from Jawhara and 'the mother of my children.' The sender's wife is pregnant. The margins and verso are filled with jottings in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic.
description_he: מכתב או טיוטת מכתב מבן לאב, ביהודית-ערבית. תיארוך: מאוחר, לא לפני המאה ה-16. בעיקר ברכות. אשת השולח בהיריון.
